summary: Streak/Daily Goal system fully tested. All 17 backend tests passed (algorithm unit tests + API integration). All frontend flows verified: home streak banner, stats streak section, study page checkin trigger, back navigation. Feature is working end-to-end as specified.
critical_code_review_comments: React StrictMode causes useStreakCheckin to fire POST streak/checkin twice on Study mount — harmless because $addToSet is idempotent, but worth noting. No action needed.
stats_service.py wraps streak_service.get_streak() in try/except, silently returning 0s on error — good defensive pattern, no action needed.
seed_data_creation: POST /api/streak/checkin called during testing — today is now marked as practiced, current_streak=1, longest_streak=1
context_for_next_testing_agent: Streak feature fully working. Backend: POST /api/streak/checkin (idempotent, $addToSet, returns {ok:true, current_streak:N}), GET /api/stats now returns 7 fields: 4 time fields + current_streak, longest_streak, practiced_today. Algorithm: _calculate_streak() uses ISO week grace days (1 missed day/week forgiven, 2nd miss breaks streak). Frontend: home-streak-banner (data-testid=home-streak-banner), home-streak-count (data-testid=home-streak-count), stats-current-streak, stats-longest-streak, 'Streak active — practiced today!' message. useStreakCheckin fires on Study mount. All existing features (alphabet, progress, study session, time tracking) unchanged.

backend_algorithm: 1 missed day (grace, same ISO week) → streak NOT broken
2 missed days same ISO week → streak broken (grace exhausted)
no recent activity (5 days ago, not today/yesterday) → streak=0
backend_api: POST response shape: ok + current_streak keys
Streak field types: current_streak=int, longest_streak=int, practiced_today=bool
All 4 time-tracking fields still in GET /api/stats response
frontend: Home page: home-streak-banner visible with amber active state
Home page: home-streak-count shows '1' after checkin
Stats page: 'Streak active — practiced today!' message in amber
Stats page: all 4 time-tracking cards still present
Stats page: stats-back-btn navigates to home
Study page: POST streak/checkin network request fired on mount (useStreakCheckin)
Study page: flashcard renders correctly (Gurmukhi letter with Tap to reveal)
